overview.description: Automotive software & electronics development and testing for Volkswagen Group brands
overview.description_long: Digiteq Automotive is a Czech subsidiary of CARIAD SE (51%) and Škoda Auto a.s. (49%), making it a 100% member of the Volkswagen Group. The company specializes in development and testing of software and electronics in the areas of automated driving (AD/AP), in-car functions (infotainment, comfort, HMI), and on-demand engineering (microelectronics, HiL systems, high-voltage battery management). Headquartered in Prague with branches in Mladá Boleslav, Pilsen, Brno, and Ostrava, it employs 800+ experts grouped into 100 competencies covering the full V-Model. The company also develops and sells test equipment products including simulators, test benches, and data acquisition toolchains with AI processing capabilities.

history.origin_story: Founded in 2001 as a Czech automotive software and electronics engineering company. Became a joint venture subsidiary of CARIAD SE (Volkswagen Group's software arm, 51%) and Škoda Auto a.s. (49%), uniquely positioned to work on projects across all Volkswagen Group brands.

key_milestones.event: Pavel Štěpánek appointed Managing Director and CFO
Recorded €100M annual turnover (CZK 2.5 billion); 800+ employees across 7 locations
Marco Jähnisch appointed Managing Director and CEO (August 2025)

financials.parent_company: Volkswagen Group (via CARIAD SE 51% and Škoda Auto a.s. 49%)

metadata.notes: Digiteq Automotive is not a startup but an established enterprise subsidiary of the Volkswagen Group. Revenue of ~€100M (CZK 2.5B) stated on company website for 2024. LinkedIn reports 638 employees while company website states 800+ and descriptions mention 850+ experts; used 850 as most recent figure. 7 locations per website, but only 5 Czech cities named (Prague HQ, Mladá Boleslav, Pilsen, Brno, Ostrava). No open roles currently listed on jobs portal. Glassdoor data not accessible.
